TestCase.name: testAppendSink
TestCase.Resource: insert into append_snk select * from src1 join src2 on src1.a1 = src2.b1 and src1.a2 = src2.b2

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.append_snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.append_snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testBottomJoinCouldNotBeConvertedIntoDeltaJoin
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk_for_cdc_src select a0, a1, a2, a3, c0, c2, c1 from tmp_abc join no_delete_src4 D on c1 = d1 and c2 = d2 and d1 <> cast(c2 as double)

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, c0, c2, c1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$6], a1=[$7], a2=[$8], a3=[$9], c0=[$0], c2=[$2], c1=[$1]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $11), =($2, $12), <>($11, CAST($2):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(c0=[$7], c1=[$8], c2=[$9], b0=[$0], b2=[$1], b1=[$2], a0=[$3], a1=[$4], a2=[$5], a3=[$6]) : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($4, $8), =($5, $9), <>($8, CAST($5):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) : :- LogicalProject(b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6], a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3]) : : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5), <>($0, CAST($6):INTEGER NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) : : :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]]) : : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, c0, c2, c1]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, c0, c2, c1]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(c1, d1), =(c2, d2), <>(d1, CAST(c2 AS DOUBLE)))], select=[c0, c1, c2, a0, a1, a2, a3, d1, d2], leftInputSpec=[HasUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) : +- Calc(select=[c0, c1, c2, a0, a1, a2, a3]) : +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, c1), =(a2, c2), <>(c1, CAST(a2 AS DOUBLE)))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, c0, c1, c2], leftInputSpec=[HasUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey]) : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) : : +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), <>(a0, CAST(b1 AS INTEGER)))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[HasUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey]) : : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) : : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2, project=[b2, b1], metadata=[]]], fields=[b2, b1]) : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]], fields=[c0, c1, c2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[d1, d2]]) +- DropUpdateBefore +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4, project=[d1, d2], metadata=[]]], fields=[d1, d2])

TestCase.name: testBottomJoinCouldNotBeConvertedIntoDeltaJoin2
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk_for_cdc_src select a0, a1, a2, b0, c0, c2, c1 from tmp_abc join no_delete_src4 D on c1 = d1 and c2 = d2 and d1 <> cast(c2 as double)

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, b0, c0, c2, c1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$6], a1=[$7], a2=[$8], b0=[$3], c0=[$0], c2=[$2], c1=[$1]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $11), =($2, $12), <>($11, CAST($2):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(c0=[$7], c1=[$8], c2=[$9], b0=[$0], b2=[$1], b1=[$2], a0=[$3], a1=[$4], a2=[$5], a3=[$6]) : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($4, $8), =($5, $9), <>($8, CAST($5):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) : :- LogicalProject(b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6], a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3]) : : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5), <>($0, CAST($6):INTEGER NOT NULL))], joinType=[left]) : : :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]]) : : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, b0, c0, c2, c1]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, b0, c0, c2, c1]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(c1, d1), =(c2, d2), <>(d1, CAST(c2 AS DOUBLE)))], select=[c0, c1, c2, b0, a0, a1, a2, d1, d2], leftInputSpec=[HasUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) : +- Calc(select=[c0, c1, c2, b0, a0, a1, a2]) : +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, c1), =(a2, c2), <>(c1, CAST(a2 AS DOUBLE)))], select=[b0, a0, a1, a2, c0, c1, c2], leftInputSpec=[HasUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey]) : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : +- Calc(select=[b0, a0, a1, a2]) : : +- Join(joinType=[LeftOuterJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), <>(a0, CAST(b1 AS INTEGER)))], select=[a0, a1, a2, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[HasUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey]) : : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1, project=[a0, a1, a2], metadata=[]]], fields=[a0, a1, a2]) : : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1]) : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]], fields=[c0, c1, c2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[d1, d2]]) +- DropUpdateBefore +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4, project=[d1, d2], metadata=[]]], fields=[d1, d2])

TestCase.name: testBushy1
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk_for_cdc_src select a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1 from tmp_ab join tmp_cd on b1 = c1 and b2 = c2 and c1 <> cast(b2 as double)

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$3], a1=[$4], a2=[$5], a3=[$6], b0=[$0], b2=[$1], b1=[$2]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($2, $11), =($1, $12), <>($11, CAST($1):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6], a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3]) : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5), <>($0, CAST($6):INTEGER NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) : :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]]) +- LogicalProject(d0=[$3], d1=[$4], d2=[$5], c0=[$0], c1=[$1], c2=[$2]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $4), =($2, $5), <>($1, CAST($5):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(b1, c1), =(b2, c2), <>(c1, CAST(b2 AS DOUBLE)))], leftToRight=[[{round=[1], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1, default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3], lookupKeys=[c1=b1, c2=b2]}, {round=[2], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src4], lookupKeys=[d1=c1, d2=c2], remaining=[(c1 <> CAST(d2 AS DOUBLE))]}]], rightToLeft=[[{round=[1], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3, default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src4], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupKeys=[b1=c1, b2=c2]}, {round=[2], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupKeys=[a1=b1, a2=b2], remaining=[(a0 <> CAST(b1 AS INTEGER))]}]], select=[b0, b2, b1, a0, a1, a2, a3, c1, c2]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) : +- Calc(select=[b0, b2, b1, a0, a1, a2, a3]) : +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), <>(a0, CAST(b1 AS INTEGER)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) +- Calc(select=[c1, c2]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(c1, d1), =(c2, d2), <>(c1, CAST(d2 AS DOUBLE)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[c1, c2, d1, d2]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3, project=[c1, c2], metadata=[]]], fields=[c1, c2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[d1, d2]]) +- DropUpdateBefore +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4, project=[d1, d2], metadata=[]]], fields=[d1, d2])

TestCase.name: testBushy2
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk_for_cdc_src select a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1 from tmp_ab join tmp_cd on a1 = d1 and a2 = d2

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$3], a1=[$4], a2=[$5], a3=[$6], b0=[$0], b2=[$1], b1=[$2]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($4, $8), =($5, $9))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6], a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3]) : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5), <>($0, CAST($6):INTEGER NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) : :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]]) +- LogicalProject(d0=[$3], d1=[$4], d2=[$5], c0=[$0], c1=[$1], c2=[$2]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $4), =($2, $5), <>($1, CAST($5):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, d1), =(a2, d2))], leftToRight=[[{round=[1], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1, default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src4], lookupKeys=[d1=a1, d2=a2]}, {round=[2], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src4], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3], lookupKeys=[c1=d1, c2=d2], remaining=[(c1 <> CAST(d2 AS DOUBLE))]}]], rightToLeft=[[{round=[1], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3, default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src4], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupKeys=[a1=d1, a2=d2]}, {round=[2], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupKeys=[b1=a1, b2=a2], remaining=[(a0 <> CAST(b1 AS INTEGER))]}]], select=[b0, b2, b1, a0, a1, a2, a3, d1, d2]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- Calc(select=[b0, b2, b1, a0, a1, a2, a3]) : +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), <>(a0, CAST(b1 AS INTEGER)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[d1, d2]]) +- Calc(select=[d1, d2]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(c1, d1), =(c2, d2), <>(c1, CAST(d2 AS DOUBLE)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[c1, c2, d1, d2]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3, project=[c1, c2], metadata=[]]], fields=[c1, c2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[d1, d2]]) +- DropUpdateBefore +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4, project=[d1, d2], metadata=[]]], fields=[d1, d2])

TestCase.name: testCalcBetweenCascadedDeltaJoin
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk_for_cdc_src select a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1, mix_ab + cast(mix_cd as int) from tmp_ab join tmp_cd on a1 = d1 and a2 = d2

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1, EXPR$7]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$3], a1=[$4], a2=[$5], a3=[$6], b0=[$0], b2=[$2], b1=[$1], EXPR$7=[+($7, CAST($14):INTEGER NOT NULL)]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($4, $9), =($5, $10))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(b0=[+($4, 1)], b1=[$6], b2=[$5], a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], mix_ab=[+($3, $4)]) : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5), <>($0, CAST($6):INTEGER NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) : :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]]) +- LogicalProject(d0=[$3], d1=[$4], d2=[$5], c0=[$0], c1=[-($1, 1.0:DECIMAL(2, 1))], c2=[$2], mix_cd=[+($1, $4)]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $4), =($2, $5), <>($1, CAST($5):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1, EXPR$7]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1, +(mix_ab, CAST(mix_cd AS INTEGER)) AS EXPR$7]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, d1), =(a2, d2))], leftToRight=[[{round=[1], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1, default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src4], lookupKeys=[d1=a1, d2=a2]}, {round=[2], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src4], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3], lookupKeys=[c1=d1, c2=d2], remaining=[(c1 <> CAST(d2 AS DOUBLE))]}]], rightToLeft=[[{round=[1], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3, default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src4], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupKeys=[a1=d1, a2=d2]}, {round=[2], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupKeys=[b1=a1, b2=a2], remaining=[(a0 <> CAST(b1 AS INTEGER))]}]], select=[b0, b1, b2, a0, a1, a2, a3, mix_ab, d1, d2, mix_cd]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- Calc(select=[+(b0, 1) AS b0, b1, b2, a0, a1, a2, a3, +(a3, b0) AS mix_ab]) : +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), <>(a0, CAST(b1 AS INTEGER)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[d1, d2]]) +- Calc(select=[d1, d2, +(c1, d1) AS mix_cd]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(c1, d1), =(c2, d2), <>(c1, CAST(d2 AS DOUBLE)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[c1, c2, d1, d2]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3, project=[c1, c2], metadata=[]]], fields=[c1, c2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[d1, d2]]) +- DropUpdateBefore +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4, project=[d1, d2], metadata=[]]], fields=[d1, d2])

TestCase.name: testCalcWithNonDeterministicFuncAfterJoin
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select cast(a0 + RAND() as int), a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1 from src1 join src2 on src1.a1 = src2.b1 and src1.a2 = src2.b2 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[EXPR$0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[CAST(+($0, RAND())):INTEGER NOT NULL], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[EXPR$0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Calc(select=[CAST(+(a0, RAND()) AS INTEGER) AS EXPR$0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testCalcWithNonDeterministicFuncBeforeJoin
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1 from ( select a0, a1, a2, cast(RAND() * a3 AS int) as a3 from src1) tmp join src2 on tmp.a1 = src2.b1 and tmp.a2 = src2.b2 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[CAST(*(RAND(), $3)):INTEGER]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, CAST(*(RAND(), a3) AS INTEGER) AS a3]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testComputeIndexKeyOnJoinCondition
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from src1 join src2 on src1.a1 = src2.b1 and src1.a2 = TRIM(src2.b2) on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $7))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalProject(b0=[$0], b2=[$1], b1=[$2], $f3=[TRIM(FLAG(BOTH), _UTF-16LE' ', $1)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, $f3))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1, $f3], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, $f3]]) +- Calc(select=[b0, b2, b1, TRIM(BOTH, ' ', b2) AS $f3]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testConstantConditionInIndex
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from src1 join src2 on src1.a1 = 1.1 and src1.a2 = src2.b2 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, 1.1E0), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Calc(select=[a0, 1.1E0 AS a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[=(a2, b2)], select=[a0, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a2]]) : +- Calc(select=[a0, a2, a3], where=[=(a1, 1.1E0)]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1, filter=[]]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testDeltaJoinStrategyWithForce
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from src1 join src2 on src1.a1 = src2.b1 and src1.a2 = src2.b2 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testDeltaJoinStrategyWithForce3
TestCase.Resource:
LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])
LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk2], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]])(reuse_id=[1]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3])
Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]])(reuse_id=[2]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])
Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[((a1 = b1) AND (a2 = b2))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) :- Reused(reference_id=[1]) +- Reused(reference_id=[2])
Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk2], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[((a1 = b1) AND (a2 = b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Reused(reference_id=[1]) +- Reused(reference_id=[2])

TestCase.name: testExplainPlanAdvice
TestCase.Resource:
== Abstract Syntax Tree == LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])
== Optimized Physical Plan With Advice == Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])
No available advice...
== Optimized Execution Plan == Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[((a1 = b1) AND (a2 = b2))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testFilterFieldsAfterJoin
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from src1 join src2 on src1.a1 = src2.b1 and src1.a2 = src2.b2 where a3 > b0 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($3, $4)]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), >(a3, b0))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testFilterFieldsBeforeJoin
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from ( select * from src1 where a1 > 1.1 ) tmp join src2 on tmp.a1 = src2.b1 and tmp.a2 = src2.b2 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3]) : +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($1, 1.1:DECIMAL(2, 1))]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3], where=[>(a1, 1.1)]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1, filter=[]]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testFilterFieldsBeforeJoinWithFilterPushDown
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk(l0, l1, r0, r2, r1) select a0, a1, b0, b2, b1 from ( select a0, a2, a1 from src1 where a0 > 1 ) join ( select b1, b2, b0 from src2 where b1 < 10 ) on a1 = b1 and a2 = b2 and b0 <> 0 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], targetColumns=[[0],[1],[4],[5],[6]], fields=[a0, a1, EXPR$2, EXPR$3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$2], EXPR$2=[null:VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE"], EXPR$3=[null:INTEGER], b0=[$5], b2=[$4], b1=[$3]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($2, $3), =($1, $4), <>($5, 0))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a2=[$2], a1=[$1]) : +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 1)]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalProject(b1=[$2], b2=[$1], b0=[$0]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[<($2, 10)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], targetColumns=[[0],[1],[4],[5],[6]], fields=[a0, a1, EXPR$2, EXPR$3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, null:VARCHAR(2147483647) AS EXPR$2, null:INTEGER AS EXPR$3, b0, b2, b1]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a2, a1, b1, b2, b0]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1, filter=[>(a0, 1)], project=[a0, a2, a1], metadata=[]]], fields=[a0, a2, a1]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- Calc(select=[b1, b2, b0], where=[<(b1, 10)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2, filter=[<>(b0, 0)]]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], changelogMode=[NONE]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), >(a3, b0))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[HasUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey], changelogMode=[I,UA]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]], changelogMode=[I,UA]) : +- DropUpdateBefore(changelogMode=[I,UA]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3], changelogMode=[I,UB,UA]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]], changelogMode=[I,UA]) +- DropUpdateBefore(changelogMode=[I,UA]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1], changelogMode=[I,UB,UA])

TestCase.name: testLHS1
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk_for_cdc_src select a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1 from tmp_ab join no_delete_src3 C on a1 = c1 and a2 = c2 and c1 <> cast(a0 as double)

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$3], a1=[$4], a2=[$5], a3=[$6], b0=[$0], b2=[$1], b1=[$2]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($4, $8), =($5, $9), <>($8, CAST($3):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6], a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3]) : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5), <>($0, CAST($6):INTEGER NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) : :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, c1), =(a2, c2), <>(c1, CAST(a0 AS DOUBLE)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[[{round=[1], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupKeys=[a1=c1, a2=c2]}, {round=[2], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupKeys=[b1=a1, b2=a2], remaining=[(a0 <> CAST(b1 AS INTEGER))]}]], select=[b0, b2, b1, a0, a1, a2, a3, c1, c2]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- Calc(select=[b0, b2, b1, a0, a1, a2, a3]) : +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), <>(a0, CAST(b1 AS INTEGER)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) +- DropUpdateBefore +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3, project=[c1, c2], metadata=[]]], fields=[c1, c2])

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{0, 7}]) :- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6], pt=[PROCTIME()]) : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) : :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[=($cor0.a0, $0)]) +- LogicalSnapshot(period=[$cor0.pt]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, dim]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LookupJoin(table=[default_catalog.default_database.dim], joinType=[InnerJoin], lookup=[f0=a0], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1, f0], async=[ORDERED, KEY_ORDERED: false, 180000ms, 100]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testMultiLHS1
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk_for_cdc_src select a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1 from tmp_abc join no_delete_src4 D on b1 = d1 and b2 = d2 and d1 <> cast(b2 as double)

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$6], a1=[$7], a2=[$8], a3=[$9], b0=[$3], b2=[$4], b1=[$5]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($5, $11), =($4, $12), <>($11, CAST($4):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(c0=[$7], c1=[$8], c2=[$9], b0=[$0], b2=[$1], b1=[$2], a0=[$3], a1=[$4], a2=[$5], a3=[$6]) : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($2, $8), =($1, $9), <>($8, CAST($1):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) : :- LogicalProject(b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6], a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3]) : : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5), <>($0, CAST($6):INTEGER NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) : : :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]]) : : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(b1, d1), =(b2, d2), <>(d1, CAST(b2 AS DOUBLE)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[[{round=[1], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src4], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupKeys=[b1=d1, b2=d2]}, {round=[2], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupKeys=[a1=b1, a2=b2], remaining=[(a0 <> CAST(b1 AS INTEGER))]}, {round=[3], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1, default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3], lookupKeys=[c1=b1, c2=b2], remaining=[(c1 <> CAST(b2 AS DOUBLE))]}]], select=[b0, b2, b1, a0, a1, a2, a3, d1, d2]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) : +- Calc(select=[b0, b2, b1, a0, a1, a2, a3]) : +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(b1, c1), =(b2, c2), <>(c1, CAST(b2 AS DOUBLE)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[[{round=[1], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupKeys=[b1=c1, b2=c2]}, {round=[2], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupKeys=[a1=b1, a2=b2], remaining=[(a0 <> CAST(b1 AS INTEGER))]}]], select=[b0, b2, b1, a0, a1, a2, a3, c1, c2]) : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) : : +- Calc(select=[b0, b2, b1, a0, a1, a2, a3]) : : +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), <>(a0, CAST(b1 AS INTEGER)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) : : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) : : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1]) : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3, project=[c1, c2], metadata=[]]], fields=[c1, c2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[d1, d2]]) +- DropUpdateBefore +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4, project=[d1, d2], metadata=[]]], fields=[d1, d2])

sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupKeys=[b1=c1, b2=c2]}, {round=[2], TestCase.name: testMultiRHS3

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, c0, c2, c1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$9], a1=[$10], a2=[$11], a3=[$12], c0=[$3], c2=[$5], c1=[$4]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($4, $1), =($5, $2), <>($1, CAST($5):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4]]) +- LogicalProject(c0=[$0], c1=[$1], c2=[$2], b0=[$3], b2=[$4], b1=[$5], a0=[$6], a1=[$7], a2=[$8], a3=[$9]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($7, $1), =($8, $2), <>($1, CAST($8):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]]) +- LogicalProject(b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6], a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5), <>($0, CAST($6):INTEGER NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, c0, c2, c1]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, c0, c2, c1]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(c1, d1), =(c2, d2), <>(d1, CAST(c2 AS DOUBLE)))], leftToRight=[[{round=[1], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src4], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3], lookupKeys=[c1=d1, c2=d2]}, {round=[2], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupKeys=[a1=c1, a2=c2]}, {round=[3], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupKeys=[b1=a1, b2=a2], remaining=[(a0 <> CAST(b1 AS INTEGER))]}]], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[d1, d2, c0, c1, c2, a0, a1, a2, a3]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[d1, d2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4, project=[d1, d2], metadata=[]]], fields=[d1, d2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, c1), =(a2, c2), <>(c1, CAST(a2 AS DOUBLE)))], leftToRight=[[{round=[1], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupKeys=[a1=c1, a2=c2]}, {round=[2], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupKeys=[b1=a1, b2=a2], remaining=[(a0 <> CAST(b1 AS INTEGER))]}]], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[c0, c1, c2, a0, a1, a2, a3]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]], fields=[c0, c1, c2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), <>(a0, CAST(b1 AS INTEGER)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b2, b1]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- DropUpdateBefore +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2, project=[b2, b1], metadata=[]]], fields=[b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testMultiRootsWithReusingDeltaJoin
TestCase.Resource:
LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])
LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk2], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[((a1 = b1) AND (a2 = b2))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1])(reuse_id=[1]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])
Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Reused(reference_id=[1])
Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk2], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Reused(reference_id=[1])

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk2], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[((a1 = b1) AND (a2 = b2))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1])(reuse_id=[1]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testNonDeterministicFilterFieldsBeforeJoin1
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk(l0, l1, r0, r2, r1) select a0, a1, b0, b2, b1 from ( select a0, a2, a1 from src1 where a0 > rand(10) ) join src2 on a1 = b1 and a2 = b2 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], targetColumns=[[0],[1],[4],[5],[6]], fields=[a0, a1, EXPR$2, EXPR$3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$2], EXPR$2=[null:VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE"], EXPR$3=[null:INTEGER], b0=[$3], b2=[$4], b1=[$5]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($2, $5), =($1, $4))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a2=[$2], a1=[$1]) : +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, RAND(10))]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], targetColumns=[[0],[1],[4],[5],[6]], fields=[a0, a1, EXPR$2, EXPR$3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, null:VARCHAR(2147483647) AS EXPR$2, null:INTEGER AS EXPR$3, b0, b2, b1]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a2, a1, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- Calc(select=[a0, a2, a1], where=[>(a0, RAND(10))]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1, filter=[], project=[a0, a1, a2], metadata=[]]], fields=[a0, a1, a2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testNonDeterministicFilterFieldsBeforeJoin2
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from src1 join ( select * from src2 where b0 > rand(10) ) on a1 = b1 and a2 = b2 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalProject(b0=[$0], b2=[$1], b1=[$2]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, RAND(10))]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- Calc(select=[b0, b2, b1], where=[>(b0, RAND(10))]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2, filter=[]]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testNonDeterministicFilterFieldsBeforeJoinWithFilterPushDown

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], changelogMode=[NONE]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[HasUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey], changelogMode=[I,UA,D]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]], changelogMode=[I,UA,D]) : +- DropUpdateBefore(changelogMode=[I,UA,D]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, all_changelog_src]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3], changelogMode=[I,UB,UA,D]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]], changelogMode=[I,UA]) +- DropUpdateBefore(changelogMode=[I,UA]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1], changelogMode=[I,UB,UA])

TestCase.name: testReadingMetadata
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk(l0, r0, r2) select a0, b0, b2 from ( select a0, a2, a1 from src1WithMetadata ) join src2 on a1 = b1 and a2 = b2 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], targetColumns=[[0],[4],[5]], fields=[a0, EXPR$1, EXPR$2, EXPR$3, b0, b2, EXPR$6]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], EXPR$1=[null:DOUBLE], EXPR$2=[null:VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE"], EXPR$3=[null:INTEGER], b0=[$3], b2=[$4], EXPR$6=[null:DOUBLE]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($2, $5), =($1, $4))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a2=[$2], a1=[$1]) : +- LogicalProject(a0=[CAST($3):INTEGER NOT NULL], a1=[$0], a2=[$1], a3=[$2]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1WithMetadata, metadata=[a0]]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], targetColumns=[[0],[4],[5]], fields=[a0, EXPR$1, EXPR$2, EXPR$3, b0, b2, EXPR$6], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Calc(select=[a0, null:DOUBLE AS EXPR$1, null:VARCHAR(2147483647) AS EXPR$2, null:INTEGER AS EXPR$3, b0, b2, null:DOUBLE AS EXPR$6]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a2, a1, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- Calc(select=[CAST(a0 AS INTEGER) AS a0, a2, a1]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1WithMetadata, project=[a2, a1], metadata=[a0]]], fields=[a2, a1, a0]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testRetractSink
TestCase.Resource: insert into retract_snk select * from src1 join src2 on src1.a1 = src2.b1 and src1.a2 = src2.b2

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.retract_snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.retract_snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testSourceDDLContainsComputingCol
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk(l0, l1, r0) select a0, new_a1, b0 from src1WithComputingCol join src2 on a1 = b1 and a2 = b2 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], targetColumns=[[0],[1],[4]], fields=[a0, new_a1, EXPR$2, EXPR$3, b0, EXPR$5, EXPR$6]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], new_a1=[$3], EXPR$2=[null:VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE"], EXPR$3=[null:INTEGER], b0=[$4], EXPR$5=[null:VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE"], EXPR$6=[null:DOUBLE]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], new_a1=[+($1, 1)]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1WithComputingCol]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], targetColumns=[[0],[1],[4]], fields=[a0, new_a1, EXPR$2, EXPR$3, b0, EXPR$5, EXPR$6], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Calc(select=[a0, new_a1, null:VARCHAR(2147483647) AS EXPR$2, null:INTEGER AS EXPR$3, b0, null:VARCHAR(2147483647) AS EXPR$5, null:DOUBLE AS EXPR$6]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, new_a1, b0, b2, b1]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, +(a1, 1) AS new_a1]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1WithComputingCol]], fields=[a0, a1, a2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testSourceDDLContainsNonDeterministicComputingCol
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk(l0, l1, r0) select a0, new_a1, b0 from src1WithComputingCol join src2 on a1 = b1 and a2 = b2 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], targetColumns=[[0],[1],[4]], fields=[a0, new_a1, EXPR$2, EXPR$3, b0, EXPR$5, EXPR$6]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], new_a1=[$3], EXPR$2=[null:VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE"], EXPR$3=[null:INTEGER], b0=[$4], EXPR$5=[null:VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE"], EXPR$6=[null:DOUBLE]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], new_a1=[+($1, RAND(10))]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1WithComputingCol]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], targetColumns=[[0],[1],[4]], fields=[a0, new_a1, EXPR$2, EXPR$3, b0, EXPR$5, EXPR$6], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Calc(select=[a0, new_a1, null:VARCHAR(2147483647) AS EXPR$2, null:INTEGER AS EXPR$3, b0, null:VARCHAR(2147483647) AS EXPR$5, null:DOUBLE AS EXPR$6]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, new_a1, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, +(a1, RAND(10)) AS new_a1]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1WithComputingCol]], fields=[a0, a1, a2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testSourceWithAllRowKinds
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from src1 join cdc_src on src1.a1 = cdc_src.b1 and src1.a2 = cdc_src.b2

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, cdc_src]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, cdc_src]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testSourceWithoutIndexes
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from src1 join non_index_src on src1.a1 = non_index_src.b1 and src1.a2 = non_index_src.b2 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, non_index_src]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[HasUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, non_index_src]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testTopJoinCouldNotBeConvertedIntoDeltaJoin
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk_for_cdc_src select a0, a1, a2, a3, c0, c2, c1 from tmp_abc join no_delete_src4 D on c1 = d1 and c2 = d2 and d1 <> cast(c2 as double)

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, c0, c2, c1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$6], a1=[$7], a2=[$8], a3=[$9], c0=[$0], c2=[$2], c1=[$1]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $11), =($2, $12), <>($11, CAST($2):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(c0=[$7], c1=[$8], c2=[$9], b0=[$0], b2=[$1], b1=[$2], a0=[$3], a1=[$4], a2=[$5], a3=[$6]) : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($4, $8), =($5, $9), <>($8, CAST($5):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) : :- LogicalProject(b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6], a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3]) : : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5), <>($0, CAST($6):INTEGER NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) : : :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]]) : : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, c0, c2, c1]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, c0, c2, c1]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(c1, d1), =(c2, d2), <>(d1, CAST(c2 AS DOUBLE)))], select=[c0, c1, c2, a0, a1, a2, a3, d1, d2], leftInputSpec=[HasUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) : +- Calc(select=[c0, c1, c2, a0, a1, a2, a3]) : +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, c1), =(a2, c2), <>(c1, CAST(a2 AS DOUBLE)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[[{round=[1], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupKeys=[a1=c1, a2=c2]}, {round=[2], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupKeys=[b1=a1, b2=a2], remaining=[(a0 <> CAST(b1 AS INTEGER))]}]], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, c0, c1, c2]) : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) : : +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), <>(a0, CAST(b1 AS INTEGER)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b2, b1]) : : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) : : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2, project=[b2, b1], metadata=[]]], fields=[b2, b1]) : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]], fields=[c0, c1, c2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[d1, d2]]) +- DropUpdateBefore +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4, project=[d1, d2], metadata=[]]], fields=[d1, d2])

TestCase.name: testTopJoinCouldNotBeConvertedIntoDeltaJoin2
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk_for_cdc_src select a0, a1, a2, d0, c0, c2, c1 from tmp_abc left join no_delete_src4 D on c1 = d1 and c2 = d2 and d1 <> cast(c2 as double)

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, d0, c0, c2, c1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$6], a1=[$7], a2=[$8], d0=[$10], c0=[$0], c2=[$2], c1=[$1]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $11), =($2, $12), <>($11, CAST($2):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalProject(c0=[$7], c1=[$8], c2=[$9], b0=[$0], b2=[$1], b1=[$2], a0=[$3], a1=[$4], a2=[$5], a3=[$6]) : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($4, $8), =($5, $9), <>($8, CAST($5):DOUBLE NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) : :- LogicalProject(b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6], a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3]) : : +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5), <>($0, CAST($6):INTEGER NOT NULL))], joinType=[inner]) : : :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1]]) : : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2]]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk_for_cdc_src], fields=[a0, a1, a2, d0, c0, c2, c1]) +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, d0, c0, c2, c1]) +- Join(joinType=[LeftOuterJoin], where=[AND(=(c1, d1), =(c2, d2), <>(d1, CAST(c2 AS DOUBLE)))], select=[c0, c1, c2, a0, a1, a2, d0, d1, d2], leftInputSpec=[HasUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) : +- Calc(select=[c0, c1, c2, a0, a1, a2]) : +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, c1), =(a2, c2), <>(c1, CAST(a2 AS DOUBLE)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[[{round=[1], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src3], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupKeys=[a1=c1, a2=c2]}, {round=[2], sourceTables=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src1], lookupTable=[default_catalog.default_database.no_delete_src2], lookupKeys=[b1=a1, b2=a2], remaining=[(a0 <> CAST(b1 AS INTEGER))]}]], select=[a0, a1, a2, c0, c1, c2]) : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2]) : : +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), <>(a0, CAST(b1 AS INTEGER)))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, b2, b1]) : : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src1, project=[a0, a1, a2], metadata=[]]], fields=[a0, a1, a2]) : : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) : : +- DropUpdateBefore : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src2, project=[b2, b1], metadata=[]]], fields=[b2, b1]) : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[c1, c2]]) : +- DropUpdateBefore : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src3]], fields=[c0, c1, c2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[d1, d2]]) +- DropUpdateBefore +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, no_delete_src4]], fields=[d0, d1, d2])

TestCase.name: testWithAggregatingAfterJoin
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select a0, max(a1), max(a2), max(a3), max(b0), max(b2), b1 from src1 join src2 on src1.a1 = src2.b1 and src1.a2 = src2.b2 group by a0, b1

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, EXPR$1, EXPR$2, EXPR$3, EXPR$4, EXPR$5, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], EXPR$1=[$2], EXPR$2=[$3], EXPR$3=[$4], EXPR$4=[$5], EXPR$5=[$6], b1=[$1]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], EXPR$1=[MAX($2)], EXPR$2=[MAX($3)], EXPR$3=[MAX($4)], EXPR$4=[MAX($5)], EXPR$5=[MAX($6)]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], b1=[$6], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, EXPR$1, EXPR$2, EXPR$3, EXPR$4, EXPR$5, b1]) +- Calc(select=[a0, EXPR$1, EXPR$2, EXPR$3, EXPR$4, EXPR$5, b1]) +- GroupAggregate(groupBy=[a0, b1], select=[a0, b1, MAX(a1) AS EXPR$1, MAX(a2) AS EXPR$2, MAX(a3) AS EXPR$3, MAX(b0) AS EXPR$4, MAX(b2) AS EXPR$5]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a0, b1]]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testWithAggregatingSourceTableBeforeJoin
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from ( select distinct max(a0) as a0, a1, max(a2) as a2, max(a3) as a3 from src1 group by a1) tmp join src2 on tmp.a1 = src2.b1 and tmp.a2 = src2.b2

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalProject(a0=[$1], a1=[$0], a2=[$2], a3=[$3]) : +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], a0=[MAX($1)], a2=[MAX($2)], a3=[MAX($3)]) : +- LogicalProject(a1=[$1], a0=[$0], a2=[$2], a3=[$3]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) : +- GroupAggregate(groupBy=[a1], select=[a1, MAX(a0) AS a0, MAX(a2) AS a2, MAX(a3) AS a3]) : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testWithAlwaysTrueJoinCondition
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from src1 join src2 on 1 = 1 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[true], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[true], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[single]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testWithCascadeJoin
TestCase.Resource: insert into tmp_snk select * from src1 join src2 on src1.a1 = src2.b1 and src1.a2 = src2.b2 join src3 on src1.a1 = src3.b1 and src1.a2 = src3.b2 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.tmp_snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1, b00, b20, b10]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6], b00=[$7], b20=[$8], b10=[$9]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $9), =($2, $8))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) : :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src3]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.tmp_snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1, b00, b20, b10], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b10), =(a2, b20))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1, b00, b20, b10], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) : :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) : +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src3]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testWithNonDeterministicInNonEquiCondition
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from src1 join src2 on src1.a1 = src2.b1 and src1.a2 = src2.b2 and src1.a0 + rand(10) < src2.b0 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5), <(+($0, RAND(10)), $4))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), <(+(a0, RAND(10)), b0))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testWithNonEquiCondition1
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from src1 join src2 on src1.a1 = src2.b1 and src1.a2 = src2.b2 and src2.b0 > src1.a0 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5), >($4, $0))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), >(b0, a0))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testWithNonEquiCondition2
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from src1 join src2 on src1.a1 = src2.b1 and src1.a2 = src2.b2 and src2.b0 > src1.a0 and src2.b2 <> 'Hello' and src1.a0 > 99 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5), >($4, $0), <>($5, _UTF-16LE'Hello'), >($0, 99))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- DeltaJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2), >(b0, a0))], leftToRight=[Binary], rightToLeft=[Binary], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, a2, a3], where=[AND(>(a0, 99), <>(a2, 'Hello'))]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1, filter=[]]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- Calc(select=[b0, b2, b1], where=[<>(b2, 'Hello')]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2, filter=[]]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testWithUnsupportedJoinType
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from src1 left join src2 on src1.a1 = src2.b1 and src1.a2 = src2.b2

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- Join(joinType=[LeftOuterJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testWithWatermarkAssigner
TestCase.Resource: insert into tmp_sink select * from wm_source join src2 on wm_source.a1 = src2.b2

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.tmp_sink], fields=[a0, a1, a2, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], b0=[$3], b2=[$4], b1=[$5]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($1, $4)], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[a2], watermark=[-($2, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, wm_source]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.tmp_sink], fields=[a0, a1, a2, b0, b2, b1]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[=(a1, b2)], select=[a0, a1, a2, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1]]) : +- Calc(select=[a0, a1, CAST(a2 AS TIMESTAMP(3)) AS a2]) : +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[a2], watermark=[-(a2, 1000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, wm_source]], fields=[a0, a1, a2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src2]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])

TestCase.name: testWithoutLookupTable
TestCase.Resource: insert into snk select * from src1 join non_lookup_src on src1.a1 = non_lookup_src.b1 and src1.a2 = non_lookup_src.b2 on conflict do deduplicate

LogicalSink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1]) +- LogicalProject(a0=[$0], a1=[$1], a2=[$2], a3=[$3], b0=[$4], b2=[$5], b1=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($1, $6), =($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, non_lookup_src]])

Sink(table=[default_catalog.default_database.snk], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], conflictStrategy=[DEDUPLICATE]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(a1, b1), =(a2, b2))], select=[a0, a1, a2, a3, b0, b2, b1], leftInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[NoUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a1, a2]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, src1]], fields=[a0, a1, a2, a3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b1, b2]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, non_lookup_src]], fields=[b0, b2, b1])
